creator: DtxdF@disroot.org
text:
Created attachment 236619
textproc/py-transpopy: Fix correct location of LICENSE and move WWW from pkg-descr to Makefile

Description:

* The LICENSE file is installed incorrectly as PREFIX/LICENSE
  instead of using the LICENSE_FILE in Makefile.
* Move WWW from pkg-descr to Makefile.

QA:

* portlint: OK (looks fine.)
* testport: OK (poudriere: 13-1, amd64)

Notes:

* I am not the maintainer of this port, but I sent a patch to fix it.
